title: APEX Supabase PM Project PSS Lineage Tranche Movement
objective: Execute the bounded Supabase PM/project/PSS lineage tranche from the completed APEX-root decomposition plan by moving only the approved lineage SQL, seed, and supporting documentation slices into their platform-root lineage homes while preserving explicit non-authority treatment and avoiding automation, knowledge-schema, runtime, or active PM schema promotion.
active_role: APEX PM Project PSS Lineage Movement Operator
dependency_note: Packet 001 defines the tranche boundaries and target homes. Packet 001a should land the root narrative and workspace-governance tranche first so the platform root carries the explanatory context before the PM/project/PSS lineage tranche is physically moved.
constrained_outputs: A bounded lineage-only movement pass for the approved Supabase PM/project/PSS SQL, seed, and supporting documentation slices
Imported lineage assets under infra/database/source-lineage/apex-resa/pm-project-pss and docs/architecture/database-lineage without changing their authority classification
An execution handoff documenting exact moved slices, preserved exclusions, and explicit lineage-only treatment
validation_steps: Confirm packet 001b moves only the approved PM/project/PSS lineage slices and does not collapse Supabase into one generic movement lane
Confirm the imported assets are labeled and placed as lineage or reference only, not active PM schema authority
Confirm automation/orchestration, knowledge-schema, and archive tranches remain untouched
Confirm no runtime code, active migrations, or PM authority decisions are changed
sql_permission_note: Packet 001b authorizes only bounded physical movement of approved Supabase PM/project/PSS lineage assets into lineage homes. It does not authorize active PM schema promotion, automation-tranche movement, knowledge-schema movement, runtime code changes, or SQL execution.
